description: Mafia Capitale is an organized crime organization based in Rome, Italy, founded in 1999 by Massimo Carminati and Salvatore Buzzi. It engaged in money laundering, racketeering, political corruption, and bid rigging, stealing funds from city services. The organization was dismantled following a major investigation in 2014, and in 2020 Italy's Supreme Court ruled that its acts did not constitute mafia association.
